channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: U.S. Navy Fighting Instructions with the Chief of Naval Operations
item.description: Join CSIS and USNI for a Maritime Security Dialogue event featuring Admiral Daryl Caudle, 34th Chief of Naval Operations.

item.title: States Weekly: April 1, 2026
item.description: This edition of States Weekly covers April 1, 2026.
